# SEO Test

Our SEO knowledge test is the most preferred pre-employment assessment for recruiters and hiring managers to evaluate candidates’ Search Engine Optimization skills objectively and quickly before the interview. The test is useful for hiring SEO Experts, SEO Specialists, SEO Consultants, SEO Analysts, and SEO Executives. This online SEO test has helped our customers reduce screening time by 80%.

## SEO Skills Test

Search Engine Optimization (SEO) is the process of using techniques and tactics to optimize the webpage or website to gain more traffic or visitors. Being in the first position in SERP gives a high traffic volume to the relevant website. An SEO expert is a person who strengthens the website's position/ranking on search engines.

‍

Our subject matter experts design the SEO skills test to measure the knowledge of SEO Experts and Analysts about Search Engine Optimization techniques and tactics before hiring. Screen potential hires by using our scientifically designed SEO knowledge test. Use intelligent reports to analyze the technical strengths of the candidates and make the right hiring decisions.

Blue hollow ring shape above and to the left of a solid orange circle on a white background.

Wondering what other skills we have in our World’s Largest Skills Assessment library?

Visit here

How it works

### Test Summary

The SEO assessment test is particularly designed to help recruiters and hiring managers to evaluate a candidate's ability to function on each strategy touching all components of the SEO roadmap along with keyword control, bidding techniques, and analytics.

The SEO aptitude test may contain MCQ's (Multiple Choice Questions), MAQ's (Multiple Answer Questions), Fill in the Blanks, Descriptive, Whiteboard Questions, Audio / Video Questions, True or False Questions, etc.

The online SEO test is designed considering EEOC guidelines, it will help you assess & hire diverse talent without any bias.

Useful for hiring 

* SEO Expert
* SEO Specialist
* SEO Consultant
* SEO Analyst
* SEO Executive

Test Duration 

45

min

No. of Questions 

32

Level of Expertise

Two solid blue semicircles arranged diagonally on a black background.

Topics Covered 

Shuffle

### Keyword Density

iMocha’s SEO skill test helps recruiters and hiring managers to evaluate candidate’s understanding of keyword density which refers to number of times a keyword appears on a website

### SEO rules

Our test assesses candidate’s understanding of Search Engine Optimization rules which are to be followed to avoid search engine penalty

Shuffle

### Page Rank

Our SEO aptitude test helps in assessment of candidate’s knowledge about page rank which rank in search engine’s results page decided by search engine algorithms

Shuffle

### Meta tag

This test assesses candidate’s knowledge about meta tags such as title, description which is short information about a webpage to tell search engines about the page context

Shuffle

### Link Sharing

This test checks candidate’s ability to link building for our website which is one of many tactics in search engine optimization

Shuffle

### Keyword Searching

Our SEO assessment test helps in assessment of candidate’s ability to research the best suitable search terms which can be used to search a topic or product in search engines

A helicopter view of the employee's progress
